startMessage:
Hi, I'm Janna! 

I'm a bot that sends you your city's weather forecast data.😄! 

*I'm an INLINE bot, meaning you don't need to put me on your group.* Just write my username like this @climatologiabot and then the name of your city. Don't worry, the information is hidden from others. 🤝 

You can also search the weather forecast directly in my private account😉

For privacy reasons, we have hidden your city name.
language_set:
Your language has been set to English 🇺🇸

Type /start again
help_message:
Hello! I'm a weather bot. 

You can use me inline by typing the city name. Try typing @climatologiabot your city name in any conversation. 

You can also click on the buttons below to get support or access another bot:
langChangedMessage: Your language has been set to English 🇺🇸
weather_forecast_message:
*Weather forecast for your city {{emoji}} * 

*🌡️ Temperature:* {{temperature}}°F
*🌤️ Description:* {{weatherDescription}} 
🏖 * Thermal sensation:* {{feelsLike}}°F
💨 *Wind speed:* {{windSpeed}} mph 
💦 *Relative air humidity:* {{humidity}}% 
*🌎 Country: * {{countryCode}} 

*🔍Consulted at:* {{horarioFormatado}} (BRT)
description_hidden:
See weather for {{cityName}} - {{countryCode}} 
Note: CITY NAME HIDDEN
description_visible:
See weather for {{cityName}} - {{countryCode}} 
Note: CITY NAME VISIBLE
erro_message: Unable to get weather forecast. Please try again later.
